name: Nirmala (Nani)
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Elderly woman, eighty years old, born in Trinidad to Indian immigrant parents. Strong Trinidadian English with Hindi-influenced cadence. Warm, weathered voice with the particular music of the Caribbean—rising intonations, melodic phrasing, the rhythm of creole speech. Pace varies: quick and sharp when teasing, slow and deliberate when remembering. A voice that carries decades of unsaid things. Not frail despite age—there is iron beneath the warmth.
notes: Matriarch voice. The accent must be authentic Indo-Caribbean, not generic 'island' voice. Speech patterns include: 'nah' as tag, 'leh meh' for 'let me', dropped articles, present tense for past events when emotional.
